title: leontopodium stellatum
intro: Leontopodium stellatum, also known as Edelweiß or Alpine Rose, is a perennial flowering plant native to the mountainous regions of Europe. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. Leontopodium stellatum has been associated with several health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, improving respiratory issues, and supporting the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically dried and made into tea, tinctures, or infusions, which are used to treat various health conditions, including colds, fever, and digestive issues.
